The \"Create MCP Command\" feature gener:
The "Create MCP Command" feature generates a workflow file that enables a slash command (e.g., /proxy) to route requests to the Antigravity Proxy.

You can customize:
• Command Name
• Filename
• Allowed Models

The workflow automatically includes conversation context.

Example:
/ag-proxy model:gpt-5 Explain this code
